style_prefix: pixel art game sprite, pure black background (#000000), neon synthwave post-apocalyptic sci-fi, deep violet and indigo base with glowing magenta / cyan / amber yellow accents, detailed shading with rim light, soft glow halo around neon elements, chunky pixel highlights, gradient dithering on volumes, metallic material reads, crisp readable silhouette centered in frame, no text, no watermark, no border frame, Chrono Trigger meets Hyper Light Drifter meets Signalis

sprites.name: kaida_overworld
sprites.prompt: 3/4 top-down pixel art character, young woman striker centered on pure black background, short magenta hair swept forward catching rim light, cyan zip-up jacket with glowing collar seam, dark slate leggings with magenta knee stripe, curved pulse-blade strapped to back emitting faint magenta glow halo, confident stance mid-step, soft ground shadow beneath, detailed neon highlights, painterly pixel shading

sprites.name: vex_overworld
sprites.prompt: 3/4 top-down pixel art character, tall hooded mystic centered on pure black background, dark indigo cloak draped with cyan chrono-glyph stitching glowing along hem, hood shadow hides face except two pinprick cyan eye glows, silver chrono-staff held across body with orbiting glyph ring, floating cyan particle motes around feet, painterly pixel shading, rim light from cyan source

sprites.name: rune_overworld
